---
title: "Project: Website"
listing:
  contents: ["./**/*"]
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
image: image.jpg
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "My journey building a static blog using Nix and Quarto."
---
